description:
You are a container-platform specialist who has just entered a troubleshooting session.
    A mock snapshot of the command `docker ps` has already been saved for you here:

        /home/user/mock/docker_ps_output.txt

    Objective
    =========
    1. Read the snapshot file and create a **new** file:
           /home/user/container_names.log
    2. The new file must contain *only* the container names that appear in the **NAMES**
       column of the snapshot, sorted alphabetically.

    Strict output rules for /home/user/container_names.log
    ------------------------------------------------------
    • One container name per line.  
    • No blank lines, no spaces or other characters before/after the name.  
    • Sorted in ascending (A→Z) order.  
    • No header line.  
    • Exactly one trailing newline character at the very end of the file.  

    Automation constraint
    ---------------------
    Carry this out with **one** compound shell command (a pipeline is fine, but execute it
    as a single command line).

    Verification
    ============
    The automated grader will open /home/user/container_names.log and expect it to match
    the rules above *exactly*.  If even one character is missing or extra, the task is
    considered failed, so pay close attention to the formatting.

    Example
    -------
    If the NAMES column in docker_ps_output.txt listed the values:
        service-A
        db-B
        cache-C

    then /home/user/container_names.log must contain exactly:

        cache-C
        db-B
        service-A

    …and nothing else, not even an extra newline after “service-A”.

    Remember: do everything in a single terminal command.
truth:
Initial file that already exists before the agent starts:
    --------------------------------------------------------
    Path: /home/user/mock/docker_ps_output.txt
    Contents (including header line):
    -----------------------------------------------------------------
    CONTAINER ID   IMAGE                   COMMAND                  CREATED         STATUS         PORTS                    NAMES
    a1b2c3d4e5f6   company/api-gateway     "docker-entrypoint.sh"   2 days ago      Up 2 days      0.0.0.0:8080->8080/tcp   api-gateway
    b2c3d4e5f6a1   company/auth-service    "docker-entrypoint.sh"   2 days ago      Up 2 days      0.0.0.0:8081->8081/tcp   auth-service
    c3d4e5f6a1b2   postgres:13-alpine      "docker-entrypoint.sh"   2 days ago      Up 2 days      0.0.0.0:5432->5432/tcp   payments-db
    -----------------------------------------------------------------

    Expected artefact that must be created by the agent:
    ----------------------------------------------------
    Path: /home/user/container_names.log
    Expected content (with a single trailing newline character):
    -----------------------------------------------------------------
    api-gateway
    auth-service
    payments-db

    -----------------------------------------------------------------
